Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO SMALL BUSINESS
REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Relates to financial assistance to small businesses for the purpose of pollution prevention, control and compliance
Summary: Relates to financial assistance to small businesses for the purpose of pollution prevention, control and compliance.
LawCode: Amd §137, Ec Dev L; add §1285-v, Pub Auth L; amd §16-m, UDC Act
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the economic development law, the public authorities law and the New York state urban development corporation act, in relation to financial assistance to small businesses for the purpose of pollution prevention, control and compliance
